title: WT-1 Staining Protocol for Podocytes
author: Frank Brosius
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8e2htge

steps.title: Deparaffinize/hydrate
steps.instruction: Deparaffinize/hydrate

steps.title: Dip in Xylene 5 minutes 2x...
steps.instruction: Dip in Xylene 5 minutes 2x (carry out in the hood)

steps.title: Dip in 100% ETOH 5 minutes 2X
steps.instruction: Dip in 100% ETOH 5 minutes 2X

steps.title: Dip in 95% ETOH 5 minutes once
steps.instruction: Dip in 95% ETOH 5 minutes once

steps.title: Dip in 70% ETOH 5 minutes in once
steps.instruction: Dip in 70% ETOH 5 minutes in once

steps.title: Dip in dH ² 0 5 minutes 2X
steps.instruction: Dip in dH ² 0 5 minutes 2X

steps.title: Dip in PBS 5 minutes once
steps.instruction: Dip in PBS 5 minutes once

steps.title: Place the slides in jar with...
steps.instruction: Place the slides in jar with preheated Retrieve All 1 and incubate 2 hrs in 90ºC water bath

steps.title: Remove and let it cool down for 5-10 minutes
steps.instruction: Remove and let it cool down for 5-10 minutes

steps.title: Pour off solution (can be reused...
steps.instruction: Pour off solution (can be reused 5-10 times) and add dH ² O

steps.title: Rinse slides in two change of...
steps.instruction: Rinse slides in two change of dH ² O 4-5 minutes each

steps.title: Soak in PBS and store at 4ºC
steps.instruction: Soak in PBS and store at 4ºC.

steps.title: Immunoperoxidase
steps.instruction: Immunoperoxidase

steps.title: Blot dry slide (leave the section wet)
steps.instruction: Blot dry slide (leave the section wet)

steps.title: Incubate 20 minutes at room temperature...
steps.instruction: Incubate 20 minutes at room temperature (RT) with blocking serum (Follow directions of Vectastain ABS Kit for dilution).

steps.title: Dilute WT-1 antibody (first antibody)
steps.instruction: Dilute WT-1 antibody (first antibody): 1:200 dilution in 1%BSA. Blot excess serum and incubate with first antibody for 2 hours at RT (2ug/section in 100ul).

steps.title: Wash in PBS 5-10 minutes (2x...
steps.instruction: Wash in PBS 5-10 minutes (2x changes) and blot dry (don’t touch the section)

steps.title: Incubate with second antibody for 1...
steps.instruction: Incubate with second antibody for 1 hour (Follow directions of Vectastain ABS Kit for dilution)

steps.title: Wash in PBS 5-10 minutes (2x changes)
steps.instruction: Wash in PBS 5-10 minutes (2x changes)

steps.title: Quench endogenous peroxidase by dipping in...
steps.instruction: Quench endogenous peroxidase by dipping in 1% H ² O ² inmethanol for 45 minutes

steps.title: Wash in PBS 10-15 minutes (2x changes)
steps.instruction: Wash in PBS 10-15 minutes (2x changes)

steps.title: Incubate with ABC Reagent for 1...
steps.instruction: Incubate with ABC Reagent for 1 hour (Follow direction ofVectastain ABS Kit for dilution).

steps.title: Wash in PBS 5-10 minutes and...
steps.instruction: Wash in PBS 5-10 minutes and prepare DAB Tablets (dissolve 1 set in 5 ml ddH ² O and filter it)

steps.title: Staining
steps.instruction: Staining: add 100ul or so DAB substrate to cover the whole section and check under the microscope for podocyte nuclei (~1 minute).

steps.title: Stop reaction in dH ² O
steps.instruction: Stop reaction in dH ² O

steps.title: Dip in dH ² O for 5 minutes 2x
steps.instruction: Dip in dH ² O for 5 minutes 2x

steps.title: Dip in 70% ETOH 5 minutes once
steps.instruction: Dip in 70% ETOH 5 minutes once

steps.title: Dip in 95% ETOH 5 minutes once
steps.instruction: Dip in 95% ETOH 5 minutes once

steps.title: Dip in 100% ETOH 5 minutes 2X
steps.instruction: Dip in 100% ETOH 5 minutes 2X

steps.title: Dip in Xylene 5 minutes 2x...
steps.instruction: Dip in Xylene 5 minutes 2x (carry out in the hood)

steps.title: Mount the slides with permount
steps.instruction: Mount the slides with permount.
